chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1773 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 7647/23 3.For hearing of main case 24-04-2024 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for respondent No.2. Mr. Nisar Ahmed G. Abro, D.A.G. ***** Learned counsel for respondent No.2 has filed a copy of Notice through statement and submits that impugned notice has been withdrawn and allotment in favour of petitioner has been restored. Learned counsel for petitioner is satisfied and does not press this petition, which is accordingly disposed of along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
